name: HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL
query: SELECT RL.RATING_LEVEL_ID, RL.RATING_MODEL_ID, RL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, RL.RATING_LEVEL_CODE, RL.STAR_RATING, RL.MIN_RATING_DISTRIBUTION, RL.MAX_RATING_DISTRIBUTION, RLTL.RATING_DESCRIPTION, RLTL.RATING_SHORT_DESCR, RLTL.REVIEW_RATING_DESCR, RL.DATE_FROM, RL.DATE_TO, RL.CAREER_STR_DEV, RL.REVIEW_POINTS, RL.NUMERIC_RATING, RL.FROM_POINTS, RL.TO_POINTS, RL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, RL.ATTRIBUTE1, RL.ATTRIBUTE2, RL.ATTRIBUTE3, RL.ATTRIBUTE4, RL.ATTRIBUTE5, RL.ATTRIBUTE6, RL.ATTRIBUTE7, RL.ATTRIBUTE8, RL.ATTRIBUTE9, RL.ATTRIBUTE10, RL.ATTRIBUTE11, RL.ATTRIBUTE12, RL.ATTRIBUTE13, RL.ATTRIBUTE14, RL.ATTRIBUTE15, RL.ATTRIBUTE16, RL.ATTRIBUTE17, RL.ATTRIBUTE18, RL.ATTRIBUTE19, RL.ATTRIBUTE20, RL.ATTRIBUTE21, RL.ATTRIBUTE22, RL.ATTRIBUTE23, RL.ATTRIBUTE24, RL.ATTRIBUTE25, RL.ATTRIBUTE26, RL.ATTRIBUTE27, RL.ATTRIBUTE28, RL.ATTRIBUTE29, RL.ATTRIBUTE30, RL.MODULE_ID, RL.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, RL.CREATED_BY, RL.CREATION_DATE, RL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, RL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, RL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, RL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, RL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15 FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_B RL, HRT_RATING_LEVELS_TL RLTL WHERE RL.RATING_LEVEL_ID = RLTL.RATING_LEVEL_ID AND RL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = RLTL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND RLTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
